title: Nursery Rhyme. DXXIX. Natural History.
content:
Johnny Armstrong kill'd a calf,
        Peter Henderson got the half;
        Willy Wilkinson got the head,
        Ring the bell, the calf is dead!
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Unknown delivers a powerful performance in "Nursery Rhyme. DXXIX. Natural History."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
